name: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
category: Sliding Window & Two Pointer Combined Problems
statement: Given a string, S. Find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.
constraints:
• 1 <= S.length <= 5*104
  • S contains only English lowercase letters.

examples.explanation: The answer is "abcd" , with a length of 4.
The answers are "ab" , "bc". Both have maximum length 2.
